---
title: "Caribou Dashboard"
format: dashboard
---

#  {.sidebar}

**Github**

- landing page
- coding
- disturbance mapping

**Bookmarks**


# Planning

## Row {.tabset}

### Tasks


### Timelines


### Data

Conservation datasets

### Methods


### Tools


### Papers


# Disturbance mapping

## Row {.tabset}

### Workplan

Disturbance mapping workplan.

### Datasets


### Procedures


### Paper


### Paper extra


# Little rancheria

## Row {.tabset}

### Worplan
